title: Geebug
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Geebugs''' was a type of [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] used to travel through the subterranean caves of [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
